arts.ttl: Will Barcelona Win La Liga if They Beat Real Madrid in El Clasico?
arts.sum: Barcelona can essentially clinch the La Liga title with a victory vs. Real Madrid in Sunday's El Clásico.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s starting XI for El Clásico against Barcelona
arts.sum: Predicted Real Madrid XI vs Barcelona : Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Tchouaméni, Asencio, Fran García; Valverde, Ceballos or Modric; Güler, Bellingham, Vinícius, Mbappé. Thibaut Courtois will be in goal, with Lucas Vázquez, Aurélien Tchouaméni, Asencio and Fran García forming the back line.

arts.ttl: Barcelona starting XI for El Clásico against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Predicted Barcelona XI vs Real Madrid XI : Szczesny, García, Cubarsí, Martínez, Martín, De Jong, Pedri, Olmo, Yamal, Torres, Raphinha. With Lewandowski and Balde both ruled out, all signs point to Flick sticking with the same starting XI that he fielded on Tuesday against Inter – a side that came within two minutes of reaching the final in Munich.

arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to face Barcelona in a must-win El Clasico contest this afternoon.
